title: wedelia hatschbachii
intro: Wedelia hatschbachii, also known as 'Golden Dew', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Wedelia hatschbachii include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Wedelia hatschbachii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
